calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-27-2002 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On November 12,2002.
Off Calendar Nov-13-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day on Default Prove-Up. Present: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Leticia Perez . Plaintiff represented by Allison S.Y. Chang, Esq. gave evidence. Default was entered against Langenauer Y. Cia, S.A. Good cause appearing, the Court ordered judgment as follows: Principal: $2,870.585.00; Attorney Fees: $15,000.00; Costs: $734.59 for a total judgment of $2,886.319.59. Judgment signed in open court.
